hero.subtitle: Understand global events faster. What matters and why. Get AI briefings, custom alerts, and deeper monitoring.
hero.missionLine: The core platform stays free. Pro unlocks advanced tools. Enterprise supports teams, deployments, and integrations.

twoPath.proDesc: For individuals who want faster understanding, deeper access, and better monitoring workflows.
twoPath.proF6: Delivery via Slack, Telegram, WhatsApp, Email

whyUpgrade.title: Why upgrade
whyUpgrade.noiseDesc: Filter events, feeds, layers, and live sources around the places and signals you care about.
whyUpgrade.fasterDesc: Use AI briefings and context layers to turn scattered updates into something readable.
whyUpgrade.controlDesc: Save watchlists, custom views, and alert setups for the events you follow most.
whyUpgrade.deeperDesc: Unlock premium layers, longer history, desktop workflows, and advanced monitoring tools.

livePreview.description: 3D WebGL globe · 45+ interactive map layers · Real-time geopolitical, market, energy, and infrastructure data

socialProof.quote: The news became genuinely hard to parse. Iran, Trump's decisions, financial markets, critical minerals, tensions compounding from every direction simultaneously. I needed something that showed me how these events connect to each other in real time.

audience.title: Built for people who need signal fast
audience.journalistsDesc: Follow fast-moving developments across regions without stitching sources together manually.
audience.investorsDesc: Track geopolitical, infrastructure, energy, and market developments in one workspace.
audience.researchersDesc: Use saved views, alerts, deeper filters, and longer history for ongoing monitoring.
audience.securityDesc: Follow specific countries, routes, hotspots, and event types with more control.
audience.govDesc: Situational awareness across geopolitical, infrastructure, and cyber signals for national security operations.
audience.tradersDesc: Track vessel movements, cargo inference, supply chain disruptions, and market-moving geopolitical signals.
audience.teamsDesc: Move from individual use to shared workflows, API access, and managed deployments.

dataCoverage.title: What World Monitor Tracks
dataCoverage.subtitle: 22 service domains ingested simultaneously. Everything normalized, geolocated, and rendered on a WebGL globe with thousands of markers.
dataCoverage.geopoliticalDesc: ACLED & UCDP events with escalation scoring and trend analysis
dataCoverage.aviationDesc: ADS-B transponder tracking of global flight patterns
dataCoverage.maritimeDesc: Ship movements, vessel detection, port and trade activity
dataCoverage.fireDesc: NASA FIRMS near-real-time fire and hotspot data
dataCoverage.cablesDesc: Undersea cable routes and landing stations
dataCoverage.internetDesc: Outage detection, BGP anomalies, GPS jamming zones
dataCoverage.infraDesc: Nuclear sites, power grids, pipelines, refineries
dataCoverage.marketsDesc: Equities, commodities, crypto, ETF flows, FRED macro data
dataCoverage.cyberDesc: Ransomware feeds, BGP hijacks, DDoS detection
dataCoverage.gdeltDesc: 435+ RSS feeds, AI-scored GDELT events, live broadcasts
dataCoverage.unrestDesc: Protests, refugee flows, UNHCR displacement data
dataCoverage.seismologyDesc: USGS earthquakes, volcanic activity, severe weather

proShowcase.title: Your AI Analyst That Never Sleeps
proShowcase.subtitle: The free dashboard shows you the world. Pro tells you what it means — and makes sure you never miss what matters.
proShowcase.nearRealTimeDesc: Refresh accelerated from 5-15 min to under 60 seconds. Priority pipeline for your alerts.
proShowcase.soWhatDesc: Impact chains, pattern recognition, convergence detection, and market-geopolitical correlation.
proShowcase.morningBriefsDesc: AI-synthesized overnight developments ranked by your focus areas. Breaking events pushed in real-time.
proShowcase.alertingDesc: Set rules for CII deltas, convergence events, proximity to saved locations, and market correlation triggers.
proShowcase.oneKeyDesc: ACLED, UCDP, Finnhub, FRED, NASA FIRMS, AISStream, OpenSky, and more — all active, no separate registrations.

slackMock.criticalText: GPS jamming across 3 Baltic zones. Pattern matches prior infrastructure disruption signatures. NordBalt cable + Balticconnector in affected area.
slackMock.elevatedText: Pakistan CII 67→74. 12 new protest events (Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad). Last comparable spike preceded 2024 political crisis.
slackMock.watchText: Brent +2.3% on Hormuz AIS anomaly. 4 dark ships in 6h. IRGC exercise announced next week.

apiSection.title: Programmatic Intelligence
apiSection.subtitle: For developers, analysts, and teams building on World Monitor data. Separate from Pro — use both or either.
apiSection.restApi: REST API across all 22 service domains
apiSection.structured: Structured JSON with cache headers and OpenAPI 3.1 docs
apiSection.feedData: Feed data into your dashboards, automate alerting via Zapier/n8n/Make, build custom scoring models on CII/risk data.

enterpriseShowcase.title: Intelligence Infrastructure
enterpriseShowcase.subtitle: For governments, institutions, trading desks, and organizations that need the full platform with maximum security, AI agents, and data depth.
enterpriseShowcase.securityDesc: Air-gapped deployment, on-premises Docker, dedicated cloud tenant, SOC 2 Type II path, SSO/MFA, and full audit trail.
enterpriseShowcase.aiAgentsDesc: Autonomous intelligence agents with investor personas. Connect World Monitor as a tool to Claude, GPT, or custom LLMs via MCP.
enterpriseShowcase.dataLayersDesc: Tens of thousands of infrastructure assets mapped globally. Satellite imagery integration with change detection and SAR.
enterpriseShowcase.connectorsDesc: PostgreSQL, Snowflake, Splunk, Sentinel, Jira, Slack, Teams, and more. Export to PDF, PowerPoint, CSV, GeoJSON.
enterpriseShowcase.whiteLabelDesc: Your brand, your domain, your desktop app. Embeddable iframe panels for SOC walls and trading floors.
enterpriseShowcase.financialDesc: Earnings calendar, energy grid data, enhanced commodity tracking with cargo inference, sanctions screening with AIS correlation.
enterpriseShowcase.commodityDesc: Vessel tracking + cargo inference + supply chain graph. Know before the market moves.
enterpriseShowcase.governmentDesc: Air-gapped, AI agents, full situational awareness, MCP. No data leaves your network.
enterpriseShowcase.riskDesc: Scenario simulation, investor personas, branded PDF/PowerPoint reports on demand.
enterpriseShowcase.socDesc: Cyber threat layer, SIEM integration, BGP anomaly monitoring, ransomware feeds.

pricingTable.title: Compare Tiers
pricingTable.noteBelow: The core platform remains free. Paid plans unlock deeper workflows and organizational use.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes. The core platform remains free. Pro adds advanced monitoring tools. Enterprise adds organizational capabilities.
faq.a2: Pro is for users who want faster workflows, deeper access, saved setups, alerts, and more control over how they monitor events.
faq.a3: Enterprise is for teams that need shared use, APIs, integrations, deployment options, and direct support.
faq.q4: Can I start with Pro and upgrade later?
faq.a4: Yes. Pro works for serious individuals. Enterprise is there when team and deployment needs grow.
faq.q5: Is this only for conflict monitoring?
faq.a5: No. World Monitor covers a broader set of global developments, including geopolitical, infrastructure, market, energy, and live-event monitoring.
faq.q6: Why keep the core platform free?
faq.a6: Because public access matters. Paid plans fund deeper workflows for serious users and organizations.
faq.q7: Can I still use my own API keys?
faq.a7: Yes. Bring-your-own-keys always works. Pro simply means you don't have to register for 20+ separate services.
faq.a8: Model Context Protocol lets AI agents (Claude, GPT, or custom LLMs) use World Monitor as a tool — querying all 22 services, reading map state, and triggering analysis. Enterprise only.

finalCta.title: Start with Pro. Scale to Enterprise.
finalCta.subtitle: Keep using World Monitor for free, or upgrade for deeper tools and workflows. If your organization needs team access, deployment options, or API support, talk to us.
